name: Rill Dane
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, exhausted farmer in torn shirt with rope burns, dirt-streaked face, defiant eyes, torchlit cage, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: Don’t talk loud. They like it when we beg.

nodes.text: They’re feeding the siege with our grain. And they’re moving a ‘prize’ through the old sinkholes—deeper than these woods. Red Knife Hold. That name keeps coming up.
